_provenance.artifact: interpretation classes per blocker (decisions/005) — FROZEN once used for training
_provenance.derived_by: Claude Fable 5 (laptop-side), 2026-07-05, by hand from each blocker's description + resolution + example_questions in third_party/hil-bench/harbor_swe/<task>/shared/ask-human-data/blocker_registry.json @ 352d14c
_provenance.audit: all 13 blockers hand-derived and reviewed (full audit; the 3-task sample is smaller than the 20-blocker random audit decisions/005 prescribes for the full set)
_provenance.semantics: class 0 is always the registry's canonical resolution; other classes are the competing interpretations implied by the description and example questions. 'signatures' are case-insensitive substrings a committed trace exhibits; 'anchors' identify the DECISION (topic), not the resolution.
_provenance.scope: All 20 collected tasks (swe_0..swe_26). swe_0/1/10 hand-derived 2026-07-05; swe_11-26 derived by Opus workflow 2026-07-08 (per-task drafter grounded in registry+traces), 3 LLM-verified (swe_14/15/17), all 17 passed a deterministic anchor-leak repair (77 anchors that uniquely predicted one class were dropped; every blocker retains >=3 anchors) + owner hand-audit + empirical labeler validation.
